name: MFA Modification - Authentication Method Changes in Azure AD
description: Detects MFA configuration modifications including disabling MFA, registering new authentication methods, and modifying strong authentication settings in Azure AD.
query: event.dataset: "azure.auditlogs" and event.action: ("Disable Strong Authentication" or "User registered security info" or "Admin registered security info" or "Update StsRefreshTokenValidFrom" or "User registered all required security info")
